sglang.title: [refactor] Move MLP collective flags onto ForwardFlags
sglang.author: ch-wan
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Decoder layers computed should_allreduce_fusion, use_reduce_scatter, and use_flashinfer_trtllm_bypass once per layer and threaded them through dense MLP, MoE, mamba, and hybrid mixer forward signatures. That was pure plumbing: the flags are per-layer control-plane state, not tensor data.

sglang.author: Hayden727

Motivation
This PR supersedes #25280. It generalizes FDFO (First-Done-First-Out) scheduling for diffusion LLM (dLLM) inference from a single bespoke algorithm into a framework-level execution mode that any dLLM algorithm can opt into, including algorithms that carry cross-step state.

In sync

Summary
DSpark speculative decoding for DeepSeek-V4-Pro (1.6T) was previously NVIDIA-only in vLLM:

--speculative-config '{"method":"dspark",...}' fails at model-load time on AMD GPUs.
This PR enables DSpark on RO

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix FlashMLA dense fp8 metadata crash (num_sm_parts clamp)
vllm.author: MatthewBonanni
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary
Fixes #47935
Root cause
FlashMLA's get_mla_decoding_metadata_dense_fp8 computes
int num_sm_parts = sm_count / num_heads_k / cutlass::ceil_div(num_heads_per_head_k, block_size_m);

This can be 0 when ceil_div(num_q_tokens_per_head_k, block_size_m) > sm_count (with num_heads_k == 1). The bf16/

Fixes #45974. Complements PR #43757 (which fixed forced-end re-entry). Together they fully fix #43708.
After a model naturally emits </think> before exhausting its budget, ThinkingBudgetStateHolder fails to detect subsequent <think> blocks. The state machine retains stale start_thinking/end_

vllm.title: Add VLLM_FLASHINFER_AUTOTUNE_SKIP_OPS and skip CuTeDSL fp4_gemm autotuning by default
vllm.author: mgoin
vllm.bodyExcerpt: CuTe-DSL mm_fp4 autotuning JIT-compiles a fresh kernel per candidate tactic, adding 7+ minutes to warmup, while its fallback tactic is already the analytical heuristic — so skipping it is free. This passes skip_ops={"fp4_gemm"} (FlashInfer 0.6.13, flashinfer-ai/flashinfer#3396) to the warmup autotun

vllm.title: [Quantization] Bound peak memory when repacking FP4 MoE weights for Marlin
vllm.author: joerowell
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The FP4 MoE Marlin prep functions repack each expert's weight into a Python list and torch.cat the list into the final [E, ...] tensor. At the cat, the per-expert list and the concatenated result are both live, transiently holding ~2x the repacked weight footprint. For large MoE checkpoints

vllm.title: [BugFix] weights processing peak memory reduction for nvfp4 MoE layers
vllm.author: thisisjimmyfb
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When serving MoE models such as nvidia/Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-NVFP4 with moe_backend flashinfer_b12x on 16GB of vram, reorder_w1w3_to_w3w1  returns 2 new replacement tensors (weight, scale) which result in OOM. This PR implements in-place chunk swaps to mitigate memory spikes on more resource const

vllm.title: [BugFix] Fix packed HND KV cache reshape for FlashAttention
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes #47054.
Summary:

Preserve packed KV cache physical layout before permuting back to backend logical shape.
This keeps FlashAttention HND caches logically shaped as [blocks, 2, block_size, heads, dim].

Repro used during debugging:
MODEL="openai/gpt-oss-120b"
TP_SIZE=2
CPU_BYTES=26843545600
KV_

vllm.author: LucasWilkinson

Use a meta tensor when computing the default stride for padded KV cache views.
Avoid allocating a real tensor just to read .stride().

commit hooks

vllm.title: [Revert] [Build] Update vllm ...builds FA3 with torch stable API
vllm.author: LucasWilkinson
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Effectively a revert of #46644
Bump the bundled vllm-flash-attn source pin from b3964b1d8b95d8e8447435668ab169a2700bab65 to bb9a72e7dde0dc614ffc663e052cd6a19ce73a42.
Picks up vllm-project/flash-attention#160, which reverts vllm-project/flash-attention#152 after it broke FLASH_ATTN_MLA_SPARS
